name: App Store Intelligence API
description: Real-time app rankings, search results, and detailed app metadata from Apple App Store + Google Play Store across 12+ countries. Enterprise-grade app intelligence at pay-per-request pricing.

endpoints.description: Top app rankings by category and country
Detailed app info: rating, reviews, size, screenshots

pricing.comparison: Sensor Tower charges $30K-100K/year. data.ai (App Annie) starts at $50K+/year. SerpAPI charges $0.01/search for limited App Store data. Our service provides full rankings + details + search at $0.005-0.015/request with zero signup friction via x402.

whyMobileProxy: Apple App Store rankings and Google Play Store data are geo-specific — top apps in US differ from DE, GB, etc. Mobile proxies from real carrier networks in each country ensure accurate geo-targeted results. Google Play has no official API and requires HTML scraping; their anti-bot systems block datacenter IPs but pass mobile carrier traffic. Apple's RSS feed is limited; the richer iTunes Search API rate-limits datacenter IPs more aggressively than mobile.
uptime: 99%+ (Apple RSS + iTunes API as primary, Play Store HTML scraping via proxy)
limitations: Apple RSS feed provides basic metadata only (no ratings/reviews) — iTunes Search API fills the gap
Google Play HTML parsing may break if Google changes page structure
Review scraping not yet implemented (app details + rankings + search only)
Rate limited by Apple/Google on high volume — mobile proxy rotation helps
